title: Ame's Stuff Datapack
description: Add the pistol and pocket watch in Minecraft
body:
[![Download RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f3364896232817aba911b513a447c3c9f2a9e9.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ame-stuff-resourcepack) --- Hello! I'm Focal. I added **Pistol** and **Pocket Watch** in Minecraft. # About this pack
**Crafting** - **Pistol**
> You will get recipes when you get **Heavy Core**
![Pistol Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81ef7508c02e139ecd46a54d98b9dc916839506e.png) - **Pocket Watch**
> You will get recipes when you get **Clock**
![Clock Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b629ce7f2cf3a55c75f9f2becca869bb4a7070.png) ## How to Use > The items in the game have lores, and the lores will give usage tips. --- **Credit** | User | | | :--: | :--: | | KanekiAkira | Idea Provider / Item Models | **Supporter** | Platform | User | Tier | Message | | :-- | :--: | :--: | :-- | | Patreon | SANS-Human | Satellite | Ultra Kill | --- **If you want to see me create more content, supporting my work gives me the energy to make more stuff.**
> [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a368690a65792758810fc081de33e5fa9c5a04.png)](https://ko-fi.com/focalsalt)
> [![Support me on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150ad87ca2fc99b8e1ebb73e00d2ac1c9a6d0c83.png)](https://patreon.com/focalsalt) --- Any BUG or Suggest, welcome to my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sErWHY8PXH) to report.
Hope you like it, enjoy :D
